name: IterableConnector
description: Connects to the Iterable cross-channel marketing API (Users, Events, Campaigns, Templates, Channels, Lists, Catalogs, Workflows, Push, Email, SMS, In-App) using a server-side API key. Supports profile upsert, event ingestion, audience management, transactional sends, and KB-sync of templates + lists.

install_fields.label: Iterable API Key
install_fields.placeholder: Paste your Iterable Server-Side API key
install_fields.help: Iterable → Integrations → API Keys → Server-Side. Sent in the `Api-Key` header on every request — NOT as `Authorization: Bearer`.

install_fields.label: Data Center Region
install_fields.help: 'us' for the US data center, 'eu' for EU. Picks the base URL when `base_url` is left blank.

install_fields.label: API Base URL
install_fields.help: Explicit base URL override. Leave blank to derive from `region` (US → https://api.iterable.com/api, EU → https://api.eu.iterable.com/api).

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Maximum Iterable API requests per minute. Default 100. Informational; the SDK honours the server's Retry-After on 429.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates the API key and persists non-secret config.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Confirms the API key by calling GET /lists.

apis.name: Get User
apis.description: Fetch a single Iterable user by email or userId. Returns the flattened user record.

apis.name: Update User
apis.description: POST /users/update — upsert user profile fields with optional deep-merge.

apis.name: Bulk Update Users
apis.description: POST /users/bulkUpdate — upsert up to 1 000 users in one call.

apis.name: List Users In List
apis.description: GET /lists/getUsers — return the emails in a list as a plain list of strings.

apis.name: Register Browser Token
apis.description: POST /users/registerBrowserToken — register a Web push browser token for a user.

apis.name: Update Email
apis.description: POST /users/updateEmail — migrate a user's primary email identifier.

apis.name: Delete User
apis.description: DELETE /users/{email} or /users/byUserId/{userId} — GDPR delete.

apis.name: Track Event
apis.description: POST /events/track — record a custom event for a user.

apis.name: Bulk Track Events
apis.description: POST /events/trackBulk — record many events in one round trip.

apis.name: List Campaigns
apis.description: GET /campaigns — return all campaigns for the workspace.

apis.name: Get Campaign
apis.description: GET /campaigns/{id} — fetch campaign metadata; falls back to /campaigns/metrics for legacy workspaces.

apis.name: Create Triggered Campaign
apis.description: POST /campaigns/create — create a triggered/blast campaign.

apis.name: List Templates
apis.description: GET /templates — list message templates filtered by templateType and messageMedium.

apis.name: Get Template
apis.description: GET /templates/{id} — fetch a single template by ID.

apis.name: List Channels
apis.description: GET /channels — list all messaging channels in the workspace.

apis.name: List Lists
apis.description: GET /lists — return all static + dynamic lists.

apis.name: Create List
apis.description: POST /lists — create a new static list.

apis.name: Delete List
apis.description: DELETE /lists/{listId} — delete a static list.

apis.name: Subscribe To List
apis.description: POST /lists/subscribe — add subscribers to a list.

apis.name: Unsubscribe From List
apis.description: POST /lists/unsubscribe — remove subscribers from a list.

apis.name: List Catalogs
apis.description: GET /catalogs — list catalog names (legacy + modern shapes).

apis.name: List Catalog Items
apis.description: GET /catalogs/{name}/items — list items in a catalog.

apis.name: Upsert Catalog Item
apis.description: PUT /catalogs/{name}/items/{itemId} — upsert a single catalog item.

apis.name: Bulk Upsert Catalog Items
apis.description: POST /catalogs/{name}/items — bulk upsert items keyed by id.

apis.name: Trigger Workflow
apis.description: POST /workflows/triggerWorkflow — kick off a workflow for a user, list, or anonymous target.

apis.name: Send Email
apis.description: POST /email/target — trigger a transactional email to a recipient.

apis.name: Send SMS
apis.description: POST /sms/target — trigger a transactional SMS.

apis.name: Send Push
apis.description: POST /push/target — trigger a transactional mobile push notification.

apis.name: Get In-App Messages
apis.description: GET /inApp/getMessages — fetch a user's pending in-app messages.

apis.name: Send In-App
apis.description: POST /inApp/target — trigger an in-app message.
